◎简　　介  

　　Due to an accident while swimming in the sea, Francis meets the surfer Moondoggy. She's fascinated of his sport and starts to hang out with his clique. Although they make fun of her at first, they teach her to surf. Soon she's accepted and given the nickname "Gidget". But it's hard work to become more than a friend to Moondoggy.【内容简介】迪扮演一个固执的小女孩，虽然身体有缺陷，可她仍然希望在原本只属于男孩的领土上冲浪。在...
